title: テンアゲ☆ヘリオスチャンネル～！

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there you are! Let's get started on Operation:
Get Japan Hyped already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Operation: Get Japan Hyped is Daitaku Helios's
plan to use her smile to "turn up the vibes" across
all of Japan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appointed me as her producer, and I'm
supposed to be helping her with it today, but...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna get the whole country hyped
with a top-tier clip dripping with positive
vibes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Um, she means she wants to take a video of
herself smiling and make it go viral. That way,
everyone will see her, right?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Okay, no time to waste! Let's do this, you two! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! Welcome to Helios's ☆ Hype Channel!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Today's challenge will be to see how many points
I can score in karaoke—while smiling!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And there's no better song for this than Umapyoi Legend ! Hit it!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Umadacchi! ♪ Sukidacchi! ♪ Ahahaha! What does
"dacchi" even mea—ack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: H-Helios! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! I'm laughing way too hard! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Today's challenge is to see if I can get through a
heart-wrenching movie with a smile on my face!
Let's get watchin'!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hngh... That poor old man's all alone now...
There's nobody to—wait, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Omigooosh! The froggy came back! Awww, the
friendship between the old man and the frog is
sooo touching!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I think we got a good clip of her! Okay! Cut!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just gotta edit the video in the app aaand...
posted! Now it's just a matter of waiting to see
how many views it gets.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What?! The views are already in the hundreds?!
And the comments are pouring in! Everyone's
writing "lmao"!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I can't believe it actually worked! Let's
keep it up, team!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios's video goes super viral and gets
over a million views in a day. But that's not the
end of it. A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: → Oh my gosh! This cannot be real! Wh-what should I do, Palmer?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Producer! I'm so glad to see you! I-I don't know
what to do!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I got a DM from N.B. asking if I'd be up for
performing in her Japan concert!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
She's a super famous international singer, and this
is her first visit to Japan! All you gotta know is
that she's the GOAT!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Look, look! She said she was shook by my smile
and that she wanted to invite me on her show
after seeing my vid!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The message she shows me is entirely in another
language. There are some pretty long words in
there...
choice_data_list:
You actually understood all this? That's
amazing!

You actually understood all this? That's
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I have no idea what it actually says! I was just
goin' off the vibes!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Eh, I'm sure it'll be fine! ☆ Anyway, I need to
reply ASAP... What should I say? Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: "OK!"

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, she replied already! Hmm... I think she's
saying we've make this concert a total hit! Um, I'll
just type...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh! She said, "Great!" Looks like she understands
me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh! Helios's vibes are so fire, they're smashing
through entire language barriers!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wait, does this mean that my plan's gone from "Operation: Get Japan Hyped" to "Get the World Hyped"?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As their plan expands to a global scale, I can't
help being amazed by the sheer presence these
two have.
